    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="tr">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Meltem & Hakan'ın Nişanı</title>
    <style>
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    :root {
    --wine: #7b294e;
    --rose: #c94f88;
    --soft: #fff3f8;
    --gold: #c4934c;
    --text: #4b2c3a;
    --muted: #7a5b69;
    --glass: rgba(255,255,255,.78);
    }
    body {
    margin: 0;
    min-height: 100vh;
    font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--text);
    overflow-x: hidden;
    background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255,255,255,.95), transparent 34%),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(255,225,241,.9), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #fff1f6, #f8e7ff 45%, #fff8e8);
    }
    body::before {
    content: "";
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 15% 20%, rgba(255,255,255,.9) 0 2px, transparent 3px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 10%, rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0 2px, transparent 3px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 70% 75%, rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0 2px, transparent 3px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 30% 85%, rgba(255,255,255,.75) 0 2px, transparent 3px);
    pointer-events: none;
    animation: sparkleBg 4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }
    @keyframes sparkleBg {
    from { opacity: .55; }
    to { opacity: 1; }
    }
    .falling {
    position: fixed;
    top: -60px;
    z-index: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
    animation-name: fall;
    animation-timing-function: linear;
    animation-iteration-count: 1;
    opacity: .75;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 12px rgba(120,50,85,.12));
    }
    @keyframes fall {
    0% { transform: translateY(-80px) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
    12% { opacity: .8; }
    100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }
    }
    .page {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
    }
    .card {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 680px;
    background: var(--glass);
    backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.72);
    border-radius: 34px;
    padding: 34px 28px 28px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 28px 90px rgba(120, 50, 85, .22);
    animation: cardIn .9s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    }
    .card::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: -2px;
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.8), transparent);
    transform: translateX(-110%);
    animation: shine 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    pointer-events: none;
    }
    @keyframes shine {
    0%, 55% { transform: translateX(-110%); }
    85%, 100% { transform: translateX(110%); }
    }
    @keyframes cardIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(35px) scale(.96); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
    }
    .ring {
    width: 92px;
    height: 92px;
    margin: 0 auto 14px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.9), rgba(255,240,247,.9));
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.8), 0 18px 40px rgba(154,64,111,.2);
    animation: floatRing 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .ring span {
    font-size: 48px;
    animation: pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes floatRing {
    0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
    0%,100% { transform: scale(1); filter: brightness(1); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.07); filter: brightness(1.12); }
    }
    .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    padding: 9px 18px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    color: #9b2f67;
    background: #fff0f6;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: .2px;
    }
    h1 {
    margin: 8px 0 10px;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
    font-size: clamp(25px, 5.6vw, 34px);
    line-height: 1.12;
    color: var(--wine);
    }
    .date {
    display: inline-flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 4px 0 18px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
    color: #8a5a23;
    font-weight: 800;
    border: 1px solid rgba(196,147,76,.18);
    }
    .subtitle {
    margin: 0 auto 22px;
    max-width: 540px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.55;
    font-size: 14.5px;
    }
    .compact-mode .main-title {
    display: none;
    }
    .compact-mode .main-title .full-title-extra {
    display: none;
    }
    .compact-mode .subtitle,
    .compact-mode .date {
    display: none;
    }
    .upload-clean-mode .main-title,
    .upload-clean-mode .subtitle,
    .upload-clean-mode .date {
    display: none;
    }
    .upload-clean-mode .ring {
    width: 74px;
    height: 74px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .upload-clean-mode .ring span {
    font-size: 38px;
    }
    .upload-clean-mode .badge {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    padding: 7px 15px;
    font-size: 14px;
    }
    .step { animation: stepIn .45s ease; }
    @keyframes stepIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .input {
    width: 100%;
    border: 1px solid #e8bfd1;
    background: white;
    color: #5b3042;
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 17px 18px;
    font-size: 17px;
    outline: none;
    transition: .2s;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(120,50,85,.07);
    }
    .input:focus {
    border-color: var(--rose);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(201,79,136,.12), 0 12px 28px rgba(120,50,85,.07);
    }
    .btn {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 16px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 19px;
    padding: 16px 20px;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: white;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: .2px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d45a94, #8f3b76);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 32px rgba(143,59,118,.28);
    transition: .25s;
    }
    .btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 38px rgba(143,59,118,.36);
    }
    .btn:disabled {
    opacity: .55;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    }
    .btn.secondary {
    background: white;
    color: #9b2f67;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(120,50,85,.1);
    }
    .btn.small {
    width: auto;
    padding: 11px 16px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-top: 0;
    }
    .warning {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    color: #a10035;
    background: #fff0f3;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-weight: 650;
    text-align: left;
    }
    .choice-title {
    margin: 2px 0 16px;
    color: var(--wine);
    font-size: 24px;
    }
    .choice-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-top: 16px;
    }
    .choice-card {
    min-height: 118px;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.85);
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(120,50,85,.1);
    transition: .25s;
    color: var(--text);
    }
    .choice-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 22px 44px rgba(120,50,85,.16);
    background: #fff6fb;
    }
    .choice-icon {
    font-size: 32px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .choice-card strong {
    display: block;
    color: #9b2f67;
    font-size: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .choice-card span {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12.5px;
    line-height: 1.35;
    font-weight: 650;
    }
    .top-upload-panel {
    display: none;
    margin: 16px 0 18px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 24px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
    box-shadow: 0 18px 35px rgba(120,50,85,.12);
    text-align: left;
    border: 1px solid rgba(241,199,218,.8);
    animation: stepIn .35s ease;
    }
    .top-upload-panel.active { display: block; }
    .folder-preview {
    display: none;
    margin: 0 0 13px;
    padding: 13px 14px;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 16px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 850;
    color: #5b3042;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(120,50,85,.08);
    word-break: break-word;
    }
    .mini-info {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: #6e314e;
    }
    .bar {
    width: 100%;
    height: 14px;
    background: #f2dbe7;
    border-radius: 999px;
    overflow: hidden;
    }
    .bar > div {
    height: 100%;
    width: 0%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #d45a94, #8f3b76);
    border-radius: 999px;
    transition: width .2s ease;
    }
    .status {
    margin-top: 10px;
    color: #7a5b69;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    }
    .success {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: #effff4;
    color: #267344;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.55;
    font-weight: 900;
    }
    .success .big {
    font-size: 38px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .audio-question, .audio-recorder {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: #fff7fb;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    text-align: center;
    color: #6e314e;
    font-weight: 800;
    }
    .audio-actions {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 12px;
    }
    .record-timer {
    margin: 12px auto;
    width: 104px;
    height: 104px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    background: white;
    border: 5px solid #f2dbe7;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(120,50,85,.12);
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #9b2f67;
    font-weight: 950;
    }
    .rec-status {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #7a5b69;
    line-height: 1.45;
    margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .audio-preview {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 12px;
    display: none;
    }
    .gift-question {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: #fff7fb;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    text-align: center;
    color: #6e314e;
    font-weight: 850;
    animation: stepIn .35s ease;
    }
    .activity-ticker {
    margin-top: 18px;
    padding: 13px 15px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.82);
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    color: #7b294e;
    font-weight: 900;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(120,50,85,.10);
    overflow: hidden;
    min-height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    }
    .activity-ticker span {
    display: inline-block;
    animation: tickerTextIn .45s ease;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.35;
    }
    @keyframes tickerTextIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .gift-amount-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 14px;
    }
    .gift-amount-btn {
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 13px 8px;
    background: white;
    color: #9b2f67;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 950;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(120,50,85,.08);
    transition: .2s;
    }
    .gift-amount-btn:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    background: #fff2f8;
    }
    .iban-amount-box {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    background: white;
    border: 1px dashed #d98aad;
    }
    .gift-note {
    margin: 12px 0 0;
    color: #7a5b69;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.45;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .link-list {
    margin-top: 12px;
    max-height: 120px;
    overflow: auto;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 10px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 13px;
    }
    .link-list a {
    color: #8f3b76;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 750;
    }
    .upload-card {
    margin-top: 14px;
    background: rgba(255, 247, 251, .9);
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 22px;
    padding: 16px;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .hello {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: var(--wine);
    font-size: 24px;
    }
    .choose-label {
    display: flex;
    min-height: 92px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    border: 2px dashed #d98aad;
    background: white;
    color: #9b2f67;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: .25s;
    padding: 14px;
    }
    .choose-label:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    background: #fff2f8;
    }
    .choose-label .icon { font-size: 30px; }
    .choose-label strong { font-size: 16px; }
    .choose-label small {
    color: #8a6574;
    font-weight: 650;
    }
    input[type="file"] { display: none; }
    .preview-grid, .gallery-grid {
    margin-top: 18px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
    }
    .preview-item, .gallery-item {
    height: 122px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    background: #f6e4ee;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(120,50,85,.14);
    }
    .gallery-item {
    height: 150px;
    }
    .preview-item img, .gallery-item img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: .25s;
    }
    .gallery-item:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.06);
    }
    .preview-item .name, .gallery-item .name {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    padding: 6px;
    color: white;
    font-size: 11px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.46);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .gift-box {
    margin-top: 16px;
    padding: 18px;
    border-radius: 24px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    text-align: left;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(120,50,85,.1);
    }
    .iban-card {
    display: none;
    margin-top: 14px;
    background: #fff7fb;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 14px;
    }
    .copy-row {
    margin-top: 10px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 11px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(120,50,85,.08);
    }
    .copy-row small {
    display: block;
    color: #8a6574;
    font-weight: 750;
    margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .copy-row strong {
    color: #5b3042;
    word-break: break-word;
    font-size: 14px;
    }
    .copy-btn {
    border: none;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 9px 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: #fff0f6;
    color: #9b2f67;
    font-weight: 900;
    }
    .gallery-choice-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 14px;
    }
    .gallery-folder-card {
    min-height: 122px;
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 22px;
    padding: 18px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(120,50,85,.1);
    transition: .25s;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .gallery-folder-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    background: #fff6fb;
    }
    .gallery-folder-card .folder-icon {
    font-size: 38px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .gallery-folder-card strong {
    display: block;
    color: #9b2f67;
    font-size: 17px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .gallery-folder-card span {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 650;
    }
    .audio-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 18px;
    }
    .audio-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(120,50,85,.1);
    }
    .audio-card audio {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .audio-card .name {
    color: #6e314e;
    font-weight: 850;
    font-size: 13px;
    word-break: break-word;
    }
    .gallery-head {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .gallery-box {
    margin-top: 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);
    border: 1px solid #f1c7da;
    border-radius: 26px;
    padding: 18px;
    text-align: left;
    }
    .empty {
    padding: 18px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    background: #fff4f8;
    color: #7a5b69;
    font-weight: 750;
    line-height: 1.55;
    }
    .footer {
    margin-top: 24px;
    color: #9b6d80;
    font-size: 14px;
    }
    .music {
    position: fixed;
    right: 18px;
    bottom: 18px;
    z-index: 5;
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.8);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
    backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
    box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(120,50,85,.18);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 22px;
    }
    .confetti {
    position: fixed;
    width: 10px;
    height: 14px;
    top: -20px;
    z-index: 999;
    opacity: .95;
    animation: confettiFall 2.8s linear forwards;
    }
    @keyframes confettiFall {
    to { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 520px) {
    .page { padding: 14px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .card { margin-top: 12px; padding: 26px 18px 22px; border-radius: 28px; }
    .preview-grid, .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .preview-item { height: 120px; }
    .gallery-item { height: 140px; }
    .ring { width: 78px; height: 78px; }
    .ring span { font-size: 40px; }
    .mini-info { font-size: 14px; }
    .choice-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .copy-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .copy-btn { width: 100%; }
    .gallery-head { align-items: stretch; flex-direction: column; }
    .gallery-choice-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .btn.small { width: 100%; }
    .audio-actions { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gift-amount-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <button class="music" id="musicBtn" title="Müzik">🎵</button>
    <audio id="music" loop preload="auto" playsinline>
    <source src="https://res.cloudinary.com/kkj1zmsg/video/upload/v1783519753/foto1_fzsxda.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
    </audio>
    <main class="page">
    <section class="card" id="mainCard">
    <div class="ring"><span>💍</span></div>
    <div class="badge">Meltem & Hakan'ın Nişan Hatırası</div>
    <h1 class="main-title"><span class="couple-only">Meltem & Hakan</span><span class="full-title-extra">'ın<br>Nişanına Hoşgeldiniz</span></h1>
    <div class="date">📅 16.07.2026</div>
    <p class="subtitle">
    Bu güzel günümüzden karelerinizi bizimle paylaşın.
    Önce adınızı yazın, ardından fotoğraf yükleyebilir veya yüklenen hatıraları görebilirsiniz.
    </p>
    <div id="nameStep" class="step">
    <input class="input" id="guestName" type="text" placeholder="Ad Soyad yazınız. Örn: Hakan Ayaş" autocomplete="name" />
    <button class="btn" id="continueBtn">Devam Et</button>
    <div class="warning" id="warning"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="choiceStep" class="step" style="display:none;">
    <h2 class="choice-title" id="choiceTitle"></h2>
    <div class="choice-grid">
    <div class="choice-card" id="goUpload">
    <div class="choice-icon">📤</div>
    <strong>Fotoğraf Yükle</strong>
    <span>Kendi çektiğiniz fotoğrafları Meltem & Hakan ile paylaşın.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="choice-card" id="goGallery">
    <div class="choice-icon">🖼️</div>
    <strong>Kayıtlı Fotoğrafları Gör</strong>
    <span>Misafirlerin yüklediği hatıraları görüntüleyin.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="choice-card" id="goGift">
    <div class="choice-icon">💝</div>
    <strong>Takı Tak</strong>
    <span>IBAN ile gönderim yapın veya kartla ödeme sayfasına geçin.</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="uploadStep" class="step" style="display:none;">
    <button class="btn secondary small" id="backFromUpload">← Ana Menü</button>
    <h2 class="hello" id="helloText"></h2>
    <div class="top-upload-panel active" id="topPanel">
    <div class="folder-preview" id="folderPreview" style="display:none;"></div>
    <div id="progressArea" style="display:none;">
    <div class="mini-info">
    <span id="progressTitle">Yükleniyor...</span>
    <span id="progressPercent">0%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="bar"><div id="progressBar"></div></div>
    <div class="status" id="statusText">Hazırlanıyor...</div>
    </div>
    <div class="audio-question" id="audioQuestion">
    🎙️ Sesli not da bırakmak ister misiniz?
    <div class="rec-status">Fotoğraf yükleme tamamlandıktan sonra burada sesli not bırakabilirsiniz.</div>
    <div class="audio-actions">
    <button class="btn" id="audioYes" type="button">Evet, bırakmak istiyorum</button>
    <button class="btn secondary" id="audioNo" type="button">Hayır, teşekkürler</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="audio-recorder" id="audioRecorder">
    <div>🎙️ Sesli Not</div>
    <div class="rec-status">Maksimum kayıt süresi: <b>2 dakika</b></div>
    <div class="record-timer" id="recordTimer">120</div>
    <button class="btn" id="startRecordBtn" type="button">Kaydı Başlat</button>
    <div class="audio-actions" id="recordControls" style="display:none;">
    <button class="btn secondary" id="pauseRecordBtn" type="button">Duraklat</button>
    <button class="btn secondary" id="stopRecordBtn" type="button">Durdur</button>
    </div>
    <audio class="audio-preview" id="audioPreview" controls></audio>
    <button class="btn" id="uploadAudioBtn" type="button" style="display:none;">Yükle</button>
    <div class="rec-status" id="audioStatus">Sesli not başlamadı.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gift-question" id="giftQuestion">
    💝 Takı takmak ister misiniz?
    <div class="rec-status">İsterseniz IBAN ile gönderebilir veya kartla ödeme sayfasına geçebilirsiniz.</div>
    <div class="audio-actions">
    <button class="btn" id="giftYesAfterUpload" type="button">Evet, takı takmak istiyorum</button>
    <button class="btn secondary" id="giftNoAfterUpload" type="button">Hayır, teşekkürler</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="success" id="successBox"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="upload-card">
    <label class="choose-label" for="photos">
    <span class="icon">📷</span>
    <strong>Fotoğraf Seç</strong>
    <small>Birden fazla fotoğraf seçebilirsiniz</small>
    </label>
    <input id="photos" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple />
    <div id="previewGrid" class="preview-grid"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn" id="uploadBtn">Fotoğrafları Yükle</button>
    </div>
    <div id="galleryStep" class="step" style="display:none;">
    <div class="gallery-head">
    <button class="btn secondary small" id="backFromGallery">← Ana Menü</button>
    <button class="btn small" id="refreshGallery">Yenile</button>
    </div>
    <h2 class="hello">Kayıtlı Hatıralar 🖼️</h2>
    <div id="galleryFolderChoice" class="gallery-choice-grid">
    <div class="gallery-folder-card" id="openPhotoFolder">
    <div class="folder-icon">📁</div>
    <strong>Fotoğraflar</strong>
    <span>Misafirlerin yüklediği fotoğrafları görün.</span>
    View remainder of file in raw view

    Footer

    © 2026 GitHub, Inc.

    • Privacy
    • Security
    • Status
    • Community
    • Docs
    • Contact
    You can’t perform that action at this time.
